examples: The rain made my quilt soppy.
She loves soppy love stories, old films, that sort of thing.
The poet’s soppy romanticism, flinty egalitarianism and ridicule of pomposity have universal appeal.
There is a great sense of patriotism and it makes people get soppy and sentimental.
Very likely this was Mr. Warchus's doing, since "Matilda" goes to much trouble never to get soppy.
